description: Graphic on a black background with a faint dark topographic-contour texture. At the top, a small red double-chevron icon precedes the white bold word 'MEXICO'. Centered is a framed booking-style photograph of a middle-aged man with graying hair, a mustache and a short goatee, photographed against a gray wall. Across the lower portion of the photo is a bold bright-red banner with a drop-shadow tab containing the single white all-caps word 'MURDER'. At the bottom is the DHS/ICE seal next to the white 'ICE' wordmark, followed by an italic 'in' and the location 'DOVER DELAWARE'. The palette is high-contrast and dark with condensed sans-serif type. Per the tweet, the man is Rodrigo Mauricio Lopez-Garcia, a Mexican national sentenced to 60 years (suspended to 15) for second-degree murder and weapon possession after re-entering the U.S. following prior removals.
notable_text: MEXICO; MURDER; ICE in DOVER DELAWARE
